Values.value: GLDExpressGateway: Invalid XML - Sent ACK with errors to client

BRANCH.COMMENT: For hard coding the namespace attribute for VendorAddDocumentRequest

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Do not fail the trxn if the logging to DB fails

INVOKE.COMMENT: Set the Error Response to VM

Values.value: Sent the xml reply to VMR and invoked the ExpressLink and got the reply Successfully.
The xml reply is sent back to VMR

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Do not fail the trxn if the logging to DB fails

INVOKE.COMMENT: Set the Error Response to VM
